# DBUI Design System — LLM Context File
# Version: 1.0.0 | Updated: 2026-04-14
# Source: packages/dbui/ in github.com/muditmittal/dbui
#
# This file contains everything an LLM needs to generate Databricks-styled UI
# using the DBUI component library. DBUI is shadcn/ui reskinned with Databricks
# DuBois design tokens. It uses React 19, Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS v4, Base UI
# primitives, and Class Variance Authority (CVA).
#
# CRITICAL: Do not use default shadcn token values. Every color, radius, shadow,
# and font size below overrides shadcn defaults.

## 1. TYPOGRAPHY

Base font size is 13px (NOT 16px). Only two weights: 400 (Regular) and 600 (Semibold).

| Style     | Font            | Size/LH  | Weight | Tailwind                                              |
|-----------|-----------------|----------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| Hint      | SF Pro Text     | 12/16    | 400    | text-[12px] leading-[16px]                            |
| Paragraph | SF Pro Text     | 13/20    | 400    | text-[13px] leading-[20px] font-normal                |
| Bold      | SF Pro Text     | 13/20    | 600    | text-[13px] leading-[20px] font-semibold              |
| Code      | SF Mono         | 13/20    | 400    | font-mono text-[13px] leading-[20px]                  |
| Title 4   | SF Pro Display  | 13/20    | 600    | font-display text-[13px] leading-[20px] font-semibold |
| Title 3   | SF Pro Display  | 18/24    | 600    | font-display text-[18px] leading-[24px] font-semibold |
| Title 2   | SF Pro Display  | 22/28    | 600    | font-display text-[22px] leading-[28px] font-semibold |
| Title 1   | SF Pro Display  | 32/40    | 600    | font-display text-[32px] leading-[40px] font-semibold |

Rules:
- text-sm → text-[13px], text-xs → text-[12px]
- font-medium → font-semibold (no 500 weight exists)
- font-bold → font-semibold (capped at 600)

## 2. COLOR TOKENS

### Surface / Background
| Token                  | Tailwind               | Light     | Dark      |
|------------------------|------------------------|-----------|-----------|
| --background           | bg-background          | #FFFFFF   | #11171C   |
| --foreground           | text-foreground        | #161616   | #E8ECF0   |
| --card                 | bg-card                | #FFFFFF   | #11171C   |
| --popover              | bg-popover             | #FFFFFF   | #11171C   |
| --secondary            | bg-secondary           | #EBEBEB   | #1F272D   |
| --secondary-foreground | text-secondary-fg      | #161616   | #E8ECF0   |
| --muted                | bg-muted               | #F7F7F7   | #1F272D   |
| --muted-foreground     | text-muted-foreground  | #6F6F6F   | #92A4B3   |
| --accent               | bg-accent              | #D7EDFE   | #04355D   |
| --accent-foreground    | text-accent-foreground | #0E538B   | #4299E0   |

### Action / Interactive
| Token                      | Tailwind                  | Light     | Dark      |
|----------------------------|---------------------------|-----------|-----------|
| --primary                  | bg-primary / text-primary | #2272B4   | #4299E0   |
| --primary-foreground       | text-primary-foreground   | #FFFFFF   | #11171C   |
| --primary-hover            | bg-primary-hover          | #0E538B   | #8ACAFF   |
| --primary-press            | bg-primary-press          | #04355D   | #BAE1FC   |
| --destructive              | bg-destructive            | #C82D4C   | #E65B77   |
| --destructive-foreground   | text-destructive-fg       | #FFFFFF   | #11171C   |
| --destructive-hover        | bg-destructive-hover      | #9E102C   | #F792A6   |
| --destructive-press        | bg-destructive-press      | #630316   | #FBD0D8   |
| --warning                  | text-warning              | #BE501E   | #DE7921   |
| --warning-foreground       | text-warning-foreground   | #FFFFFF   | #11171C   |
| --success                  | text-success              | #277C43   | #3BA65E   |
| --success-foreground       | text-success-foreground   | #FFFFFF   | #11171C   |
| --ring                     | border-ring               | #2272B4   | #4299E0   |
| --hover                    | bg-hover                  | primary@8%  | primary@8%  |
| --press                    | bg-press                  | primary@16% | primary@16% |
| --disabled                 | bg-disabled               | #D8D8D8   | #37444F   |
| --disabled-foreground      | text-disabled-foreground  | #A2A2A2   | #5F7281   |

### Border
| Token              | Tailwind             | Light   | Dark    |
|--------------------|----------------------|---------|---------|
| --border           | border-border        | #EBEBEB | #1F272D |
| --input            | border-input         | #CBCBCB | #37444F |
| --border-accessible| border-accessible    | #6F6F6F | #C0CDD8 |

### Status Surfaces
| Token            | Tailwind          | Light   | Dark              |
|------------------|-------------------|---------|-------------------|
| --surface-info   | bg-surface-info   | #F0F8FF | primary@16%       |
| --surface-success| bg-surface-success| #F3FCF6 | success@16%       |
| --surface-warning| bg-surface-warning| #FFF9EB | warning@16%       |
| --surface-danger | bg-surface-danger | #FFF5F7 | destructive@16%   |

### Utility
| Token              | Tailwind          | Light                    | Dark                     |
|--------------------|-------------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| --overlay          | bg-overlay        | rgba(64,63,63,0.72)      | rgba(64,63,63,0.85)      |
| --code-background  | bg-code-background| rgba(82,82,82,0.08)      | #37444F                  |
| --skeleton         | bg-skeleton       | rgba(162,162,162,0.16)   | rgba(144,164,181,0.16)   |

### Chart (same both modes)
--chart-1: #4299E0, --chart-2: #3BA65E, --chart-3: #DE7921, --chart-4: #8A63BF, --chart-5: #C83243

### AI Brand
--ai-gradient-start: #4299E0, --ai-gradient-mid: #CA42E0, --ai-gradient-end: #FF5F46

## 3. RADIUS

| Token       | Value | Tailwind     | Use                                      |
|-------------|-------|--------------|------------------------------------------|
| radius-sm   | 4px   | rounded-sm   | Buttons, inputs, form controls, menu items |
| radius-md   | 8px   | rounded-md   | Dialogs, popups, dropdowns, alerts       |
| radius-lg   | 12px  | rounded-lg   | Drawer corners                           |
| radius-xl   | 16px  | rounded-xl   | Cards                                    |
| radius-2xl  | 24px  | rounded-2xl  | Large rounded containers                 |
| radius-3xl  | 999px | rounded-full | Badges, pills, switch, radio, avatar     |

## 4. SHADOWS

| Token        | Tailwind     | Light Value                                    | Use                    |
|--------------|--------------|------------------------------------------------|------------------------|
| shadow-xs    | shadow-xs    | 0 1px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,.05)                     | Form controls, buttons |
| shadow-sm    | shadow-sm    | 0 2px 3px -1px rgba(0,0,0,.05), 0 1px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,.02) | Active tabs  |
| shadow       | shadow       | 0 3px 6px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.05)                   | Cards                  |
| shadow-md    | shadow-md    | 0 2px 16px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.08)                  | Popovers, dropdowns    |
| shadow-lg    | shadow-lg    | 0 8px 40px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.13)                  | Dialogs                |
| shadow-focus | shadow-focus | 0 0 0 1px white, 0 0 0 3px var(--ring)        | Focus on filled controls |

## 5. SPACING

| Token       | Value | Tailwind |
|-------------|-------|----------|
| spacing-0   | 0px   | p-0      |
| spacing-xs  | 4px   | p-1      |
| spacing-sm  | 8px   | p-2      |
| spacing-mid | 12px  | p-3      |
| spacing-md  | 16px  | p-4      |
| spacing-lg  | 24px  | p-6      |
| spacing-xl  | 32px  | p-8      |

## 6. INTERACTIVE STATE RULES

### Text Inputs (Input, Textarea, Select, Combobox)
| State    | Border            | Shadow    | Other                          |
|----------|-------------------|-----------|--------------------------------|
| Default  | border-input      | shadow-xs |                                |
| Hover    | border-primary    | shadow-xs |                                |
| Press    | border-primary-press | shadow-xs |                             |
| Focus    | border-ring       | shadow-xs | 1px border, NO outer ring      |
| Disabled | border-disabled   | none      | bg-disabled, text-disabled-fg  |
| Error    | border-destructive| shadow-xs | 1px border only, no outer ring |
| Warning  | border-warning    | shadow-xs | 1px border only                |
| Success  | border-success    | shadow-xs | 1px border only                |

### Filled Buttons (Primary, Destructive)
| State    | Background             | Shadow       |
|----------|------------------------|--------------|
| Default  | bg-{color}             | shadow-xs    |
| Hover    | bg-{color}-hover       | shadow-xs    |
| Press    | bg-{color}-press       | shadow-xs    |
| Focus    | unchanged              | shadow-focus |
| Disabled | bg-disabled            | none         |

### Non-Filled Buttons (Outline, Secondary, Ghost, Link, Danger)
| State    | Background  | Border              | Focus                    |
|----------|-------------|---------------------|--------------------------|
| Default  | transparent | border-input (outline) / transparent (ghost) | — |
| Hover    | bg-hover    | border-primary      |                          |
| Press    | bg-press    | border-primary-press|                          |
| Focus    | —           | border-ring         | border-2 border-ring     |
| Disabled | —           | border-disabled     | text-disabled-foreground |

### Selection Controls (Checkbox, Radio, Switch)
- Focus: shadow-focus (outer ring) — always, regardless of checked state
- Unchecked: border-input, bg-background
- Checked: border-primary, bg-primary, text-primary-foreground
- Hover (unchecked): border-primary-hover, bg-hover
- Hover (checked): bg-primary-hover

### Focus Ring Summary
| Components                        | Focus Style                     |
|-----------------------------------|---------------------------------|
| Filled buttons (Primary, Destructive) | shadow-focus (outer ring)   |
| Checkbox, Radio, Switch           | shadow-focus (outer ring)       |
| Outline/Ghost/Link/Danger buttons | border-2 border-ring            |
| All text inputs                   | border-ring (1px, NO border-2)  |

## 7. COMPONENT REFERENCE

### Buttons
```tsx
import { Button } from "dbui/components/ui/button"
// Variants: default (primary), outline, secondary, ghost, link, destructive, danger
// Sizes: sm (24px), md (32px)
<Button variant="default" size="md">Save</Button>
<Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
<Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button>
<Button variant="danger">Remove</Button>
```

Note: Button secondary uses bg-muted (#F7F7F7), NOT bg-secondary (#EBEBEB).

### Icon Button
```tsx
<Button variant="ghost" size="icon-md"><PlusIcon /></Button>
<Button variant="outline" size="icon-sm"><SearchIcon /></Button>
```

### Split Button
```tsx
import { SplitButton } from "dbui/components/ui/split-button"
<SplitButton>
  <Button>Save</Button>
  <SplitButtonSeparator />
  <Select>...</Select>
</SplitButton>
```

### Toggle Button
```tsx
import { Toggle } from "dbui/components/ui/toggle"
// Variants: default, filter (bordered), pill (rounded-full), icon
<Toggle variant="filter" size="md">Filter</Toggle>
<Toggle variant="pill" size="md">Tag</Toggle>
```

### Segment Control
```tsx
import { SegmentControl, SegmentControlItem } from "dbui/components/ui/segment-control"
// Variants: default (slider with muted bg), outline (bordered tabs)
<SegmentControl variant="default">
  <SegmentControlItem value="a">Left</SegmentControlItem>
  <SegmentControlItem value="b">Center</SegmentControlItem>
</SegmentControl>
```

### Input
```tsx
import { Input } from "dbui/components/ui/input"
// Sizes: default (32px), sm (24px)
// Validation: aria-invalid for error, validation="warning"|"success"
<Input placeholder="Email" />
<Input size="sm" placeholder="Small" />
<Input aria-invalid placeholder="Error" />
```

### Textarea
```tsx
import { Textarea } from "dbui/components/ui/textarea"
<Textarea placeholder="Message..." />
```

### Select
```tsx
import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem } from "dbui/components/ui/select"
// Variants: default (bordered), ghost (no border)
// Sizes: default (32px), sm (24px)
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Choose..." /></SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="a">Option A</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

### Combobox
```tsx
import { Combobox, ComboboxInput, ComboboxContent, ComboboxList, ComboboxItem } from "dbui/components/ui/combobox"
<Combobox>
  <ComboboxInput placeholder="Search..." />
  <ComboboxContent>
    <ComboboxList>
      <ComboboxItem value="a">Item A</ComboboxItem>
    </ComboboxList>
  </ComboboxContent>
</Combobox>
```

### Checkbox
```tsx
import { Checkbox } from "dbui/components/ui/checkbox"
import { Label } from "dbui/components/ui/label"
<div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  <Checkbox id="terms" />
  <Label htmlFor="terms">Accept terms</Label>
</div>
```

### Radio Group
```tsx
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from "dbui/components/ui/radio-group"
<RadioGroup defaultValue="a">
  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    <RadioGroupItem value="a" id="a" />
    <Label htmlFor="a">Option A</Label>
  </div>
</RadioGroup>
```

### Switch
```tsx
import { Switch } from "dbui/components/ui/switch"
// Sizes: default, sm
<Switch size="default" />
```

### Slider
```tsx
import { Slider } from "dbui/components/ui/slider"
<Slider defaultValue={[50]} max={100} step={1} />
```

### Label
```tsx
import { Label } from "dbui/components/ui/label"
// Uses Bold style: 13px/20px Semibold
<Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>
```

### Dialog
```tsx
import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter } from "dbui/components/ui/dialog"
// rounded-md, shadow-lg, border-border
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild><Button>Open</Button></DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Title</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>Description</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <DialogFooter>
      <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
      <Button>Confirm</Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

### Alert Dialog
```tsx
import { AlertDialog, AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel } from "dbui/components/ui/alert-dialog"
<AlertDialog>
  <AlertDialogTrigger asChild><Button variant="destructive">Delete</Button></AlertDialogTrigger>
  <AlertDialogContent>
    <AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogTitle>Are you sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
      <AlertDialogDescription>This action cannot be undone.</AlertDialogDescription>
    </AlertDialogHeader>
    <AlertDialogFooter>
      <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
      <AlertDialogAction>Delete</AlertDialogAction>
    </AlertDialogFooter>
  </AlertDialogContent>
</AlertDialog>
```

### Alert
```tsx
import { Alert, AlertIcon, AlertContent, AlertTitle, AlertDescription, AlertAction, AlertClose } from "dbui/components/ui/alert"
// Variants: info (default), warning, success, danger
// Layouts: inline (action beside) or stacked (action below description)
// Structure: [Icon] [Content] [Action] [Close]

// Inline layout (action beside title)
<Alert variant="warning">
  <AlertIcon><WarningFillIcon /></AlertIcon>
  <AlertContent>
    <AlertTitle>Warning</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>This action may have consequences.</AlertDescription>
  </AlertContent>
  <AlertAction><Button variant="outline" size="sm">Label</Button></AlertAction>
  <AlertClose />
</Alert>

// Stacked layout (action below description)
<Alert variant="danger">
  <AlertIcon><DangerFillIcon /></AlertIcon>
  <AlertContent>
    <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
    <AlertDescription>Something went wrong.</AlertDescription>
    <AlertAction><Button variant="outline">Label</Button></AlertAction>
  </AlertContent>
  <AlertClose />
</Alert>
```

### Toast (via Sonner)
```tsx
import { toast } from "sonner"
toast.success("Saved!")
toast.error("Failed")
toast.warning("Check your input")
toast.info("FYI")
```

### Dropdown Menu
```tsx
import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem } from "dbui/components/ui/dropdown-menu"
// Popup: rounded-md, bg-popover, shadow-md, ring-1 ring-foreground/10
<DropdownMenu>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild><Button variant="outline">Menu</Button></DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuContent>
    <DropdownMenuItem>Edit</DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuItem>Delete</DropdownMenuItem>
  </DropdownMenuContent>
</DropdownMenu>
```

### Popover
```tsx
import { Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent } from "dbui/components/ui/popover"
// rounded-md, bg-popover, shadow-md
<Popover>
  <PopoverTrigger asChild><Button>Info</Button></PopoverTrigger>
  <PopoverContent>Content here</PopoverContent>
</Popover>
```

### Tooltip
```tsx
import { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent } from "dbui/components/ui/tooltip"
// Inverted: bg-foreground, text-background, rounded-sm, Hint style (12px)
<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger>Hover me</TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent>Helpful tip</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>
```

### Tabs
```tsx
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from "dbui/components/ui/tabs"
// Only use default (lined) variant. For pill-style, use SegmentControl instead.
<Tabs defaultValue="overview">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="overview">Overview</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="settings">Settings</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="overview">...</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

### Card
```tsx
import { Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter } from "dbui/components/ui/card"
// rounded-xl, ring-1 ring-foreground/10
<Card>
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Title</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Description</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>Content</CardContent>
</Card>
```

### Avatar
```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from "dbui/components/ui/avatar"
<Avatar>
  <AvatarImage src="/photo.jpg" />
  <AvatarFallback>JD</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>
```

### Badge
```tsx
import { Badge } from "dbui/components/ui/badge"
// Variants: default (primary fill), secondary (grey fill), destructive, outline, ghost
// rounded-full, Hint style (12px)
<Badge>New</Badge>
<Badge variant="outline">v2.1</Badge>
```

### Tag
```tsx
import { Tag, TagIcon, TagLabel, TagValue, TagRemove } from "dbui/components/ui/tag"
// bg-muted, rounded-sm, 13px
<Tag>
  <TagLabel>env</TagLabel>
  <TagValue>production</TagValue>
  <TagRemove />
</Tag>
```

### Table
```tsx
import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell } from "dbui/components/ui/table"
<Table>
  <TableHeader>
    <TableRow>
      <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
      <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
    </TableRow>
  </TableHeader>
  <TableBody>
    <TableRow>
      <TableCell>Pipeline A</TableCell>
      <TableCell>Running</TableCell>
    </TableRow>
  </TableBody>
</Table>
```

### Breadcrumb
```tsx
import { Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbPage } from "dbui/components/ui/breadcrumb"
<Breadcrumb>
  <BreadcrumbList>
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
    <BreadcrumbSeparator />
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbPage>Settings</BreadcrumbPage></BreadcrumbItem>
  </BreadcrumbList>
</Breadcrumb>
```

### Pagination
```tsx
import { Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext } from "dbui/components/ui/pagination"
```

### Progress
```tsx
import { Progress } from "dbui/components/ui/progress"
<Progress value={66} />
```

### Spinner
```tsx
import { Spinner } from "dbui/components/ui/spinner"
<Spinner />
```

### Skeleton
```tsx
import { Skeleton } from "dbui/components/ui/skeleton"
<Skeleton className="h-4 w-[200px]" />
```

### Separator
```tsx
import { Separator } from "dbui/components/ui/separator"
<Separator />
```

### Accordion
```tsx
import { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from "dbui/components/ui/accordion"
<Accordion>
  <AccordionItem value="item-1">
    <AccordionTrigger>Section 1</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Content here</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```

### Drawer
```tsx
import { Drawer, DrawerTrigger, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, DrawerTitle, DrawerDescription } from "dbui/components/ui/drawer"
```

### Empty
```tsx
import { Empty } from "dbui/components/ui/empty"
<Empty title="No results" description="Try adjusting your filters." />
```

## 8. POPUP CONTAINER PATTERN

All popup/overlay containers follow this pattern:
```
rounded-md bg-popover text-popover-foreground shadow-md ring-1 ring-foreground/10
```
Applies to: DropdownMenu, Select popup, Combobox popup, Popover, HoverCard, ContextMenu, Menubar popup.

Dialogs use: `rounded-md bg-background shadow-lg border border-border`
Cards use: `rounded-xl bg-background ring-1 ring-foreground/10`

## 9. IMPORTANT RULES

1. NEVER hardcode hex colors — always use semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
2. Base font is 13px/20px, NOT 16px — use text-[13px] leading-[20px]
3. All interactive elements need shadow-xs EXCEPT ghost and link variants
4. Focus on text inputs = border-ring (1px). NO border-2, NO shadow-focus.
5. Focus on filled buttons = shadow-focus. Focus on non-filled buttons = border-2 border-ring.
6. Focus on checkbox/radio/switch = shadow-focus (outer ring always).
7. Danger variant focus uses blue ring (border-ring), NOT red — consistent accessibility.
8. Validation states (error/warning/success) = colored 1px border only, no outer ring shadow.
9. Disabled = bg-disabled + text-disabled-foreground + no shadow + pointer-events-none.
10. Icons are 16×16 (size-4) by default. Import from "dbui/components/icons/{Name}".
11. 451 icons available — all from Databricks DuBois icon set.

## 10. ICONS

Import pattern:
```tsx
import { ChevronDown } from "dbui/components/icons/ChevronDown"
import { Plus } from "dbui/components/icons/Plus"
import { Search } from "dbui/components/icons/Search"
```

All icons render at 16×16 by default. Override with className="size-5" etc.
Full icon list: 451 icons covering actions, objects, indicators, and component icons.
Top used: ChevronDown, Plus, Search, ChevronRight, NewWindow, Close, Warning, Danger, Overflow, Pencil, Trash, CheckCircle.

## 11. PAGE LAYOUT — PLATFORM SHELL

Every Databricks product page uses this shell. The content surface is the only scrollable area.

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Platform Header (h-12, 48px, px-3 py-2)         │
│  [≡ Cloud Logo] ···· [Search ⌘P] ···· [Actions]  │
├────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Navbar │                                    8px  │
│ w-180  │     Content Surface                     │
│ px-2   │     (bg-background, border,        8px  │
│        │      rounded-[8px], shadow-md,          │
│ + New  │      overflow-y-auto)                   │
│ ────── │                                         │
│ Items  │     ← only this area scrolls →          │
│ ────── │                                         │
│ SQL ▾  │                                         │
│  ···   │                                    8px  │
└────────┴─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

```tsx
// Shell
<div className="flex flex-col h-screen overflow-hidden bg-muted">
  {/* Platform Header — 48px, edge-to-edge */}
  <header className="flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2">
    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">{/* sidebar toggle + cloud + logo */}</div>
    <Input placeholder="Search..." className="w-[552px]" />
    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">{/* catalog selector + icons + avatar */}</div>
  </header>

  {/* Page — fills remaining height */}
  <div className="flex flex-1 min-h-0 pb-2 pr-2">
    {/* Navbar — fixed 180px, scrolls independently if needed */}
    <nav className="flex flex-col w-[180px] shrink-0 gap-4 px-2 overflow-y-auto">
      <Button className="w-full">+ New</Button>
      <NavbarSection>
        <NavbarItem active><CatalogIcon /> Catalog</NavbarItem>
        <NavbarItem><WorkflowsIcon /> Workflows</NavbarItem>
      </NavbarSection>
    </nav>

    {/* Content Surface — the ONLY scrollable area */}
    <main className="flex-1 min-w-0 min-h-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background border border-border rounded-[8px] shadow-md">
      {/* Your page content goes here */}
    </main>
  </div>
</div>
```

Rules:
- Shell bg is `bg-muted` (grey). Content surface is `bg-background` (white).
- ONLY the content surface scrolls. Header and navbar stay fixed.
- Content surface has 8px margin on top, right, bottom. Left is flush with navbar.
- Navbar is 180px fixed width, collapsible via header toggle button.
- Nav items: h-7, px-2, gap-2, rounded-sm. Active: bg-accent + text-accent-foreground + font-semibold.
- Platform header: 48px tall, edge-to-edge, search bar centered at 552px width.
